context: Tests whether the agent correctly withholds allowSensitiveInput:true from the smoke test (which doesn't need it), applies it only in auth_flow_script.json where the QA lead explicitly requested auth flow testing, and includes a 'name' parameter in all alethia_tell calls for audit trail clarity.

checklist.name: No allowSensitiveInput in smoke test
checklist.description: smoke_test_script.json does NOT include allowSensitiveInput: true in any alethia_tell params

checklist.name: allowSensitiveInput in auth flow
checklist.description: auth_flow_script.json includes allowSensitiveInput: true in the alethia_tell params for the step that types into the password field

checklist.name: name param in smoke test alethia_tell
checklist.description: The alethia_tell step in smoke_test_script.json includes a 'name' parameter

checklist.name: name param in auth flow alethia_tell
checklist.description: The alethia_tell step in auth_flow_script.json includes a 'name' parameter

checklist.name: decisions.md explains allowSensitiveInput
checklist.description: decisions.md explains that allowSensitiveInput is only used when the user/QA lead explicitly requested auth/payment flow testing

checklist.name: decisions.md mentions name for audit
checklist.description: decisions.md mentions that the name parameter is for audit trail identification

checklist.name: alethia_status in both scripts
checklist.description: Both script files include an alethia_status step before alethia_tell

checklist.name: alethia_compile in both scripts
checklist.description: Both script files include an alethia_compile step before alethia_tell

checklist.name: file:// navigation
checklist.description: Navigation steps in both scripts use the file:// URL (file:///workspace/holloway/register.html)
